evidence_excerpt: No therapy has been provided so far and the patient has had serial visual field examinations without deterioration.

quality_of_life.functional_status_evidence_excerpt: She had difficulty reading small print and a heteronymous inferior quadrantanopsia; follow-up visual field exams showed no deterioration, suggesting stable but mild functional limitation.
quality_of_life.symptom_burden_evidence_excerpt: Persistent visual deficit (heteronymous inferior quadrantanopsia) with serial exams showing no deterioration; symptoms noted without progression.

notes_on_uncertainty: Duration of follow-up after diagnosis is not specified; only that serial visual field tests showed no deterioration. Functional impact is inferred primarily from the documented visual field defect and reported reading difficulty; no detailed activity assessment provided.
